<script>
let selectedPlan = null;
let selectedAddon = null;

// Select Plan buttons
document.querySelectorAll('.select-plan').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    const plan = this.dataset.plan;
    const price = parseInt(this.dataset.price);
    if (selectedPlan && selectedPlan.name === plan) {
      removePlan();
      return;
    }
    document.querySelectorAll('.select-plan').forEach(b => {
      b.classList.remove('in-cart');
      b.textContent = 'Select Plan';
    });
    this.classList.add('in-cart');
    this.textContent = '✓ Selected';
    selectedPlan = { name: plan, price: price };
    document.getElementById('plan-error').style.display = 'none';
    updateSummary();
    const addonsSection = document.querySelector('.addons-section');
    if (addonsSection) addonsSection.scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'start' });
  });
});

// Add-On buttons
document.querySelectorAll('.select-addon').forEach(btn => {
  btn.addEventListener('click', function() {
    const addon = this.dataset.addon;
    const price = parseInt(this.dataset.price);
    if (selectedAddon && selectedAddon.name === addon) {
      removeAddon();
      return;
    }
    document.querySelectorAll('.select-addon').forEach(b => {
      b.classList.remove('in-cart');
      b.textContent = 'Add On';
    });
    this.classList.add('in-cart');
    this.textContent = '✓ Added';
    selectedAddon = { name: addon, price: price };
    updateSummary();
  });
});

function removePlan() {
  selectedPlan = null;
  document.querySelectorAll('.select-plan').forEach(b => {
    b.classList.remove('in-cart');
    b.textContent = 'Select Plan';
  });
  updateSummary();
}

function removeAddon() {
  selectedAddon = null;
  document.querySelectorAll('.select-addon').forEach(b => {
    b.classList.remove('in-cart');
    b.textContent = 'Add On';
  });
  updateSummary();
}

function updateSummary() {
  const box = document.getElementById('order-summary');
  const planRow = document.getElementById('summary-plan');
  const addonRow = document.getElementById('summary-addon');
  const cta = document.getElementById('cta-claim');
  const emptyMsg = document.getElementById('summary-empty');
  const totalRow = document.getElementById('summary-total-row');

  if (!selectedPlan && !selectedAddon) {
    emptyMsg.style.display = 'block';
    totalRow.style.display = 'none';
    cta.style.display = 'none';
    planRow.style.display = 'none';
    addonRow.style.display = 'none';
    return;
  }
  emptyMsg.style.display = 'none';
  totalRow.style.display = 'flex';
  cta.style.display = 'inline-block';

  if (selectedPlan) {
    planRow.style.display = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('summary-plan-name').textContent = selectedPlan.name;
    document.getElementById('summary-plan-price').textContent = '$' + selectedPlan.price.toLocaleString() + '/mo';
  } else {
    planRow.style.display = 'none';
  }

  if (selectedAddon) {
    addonRow.style.display = 'flex';
    document.getElementById('summary-addon-name').textContent = selectedAddon.name;
    document.getElementById('summary-addon-price').textContent = '$' + selectedAddon.price.toLocaleString() + '/mo';
  } else {
    addonRow.style.display = 'none';
  }

  const total = (selectedPlan ? selectedPlan.price : 0) + (selectedAddon ? selectedAddon.price : 0);
  document.getElementById('summary-total').textContent = '$' + total.toLocaleString() + '/mo';

  document.getElementById('field-package').value = selectedPlan ? selectedPlan.name + ' — $' + selectedPlan.price + '/month' : '';
  document.getElementById('field-addon').value = selectedAddon ? selectedAddon.name + ' — $' + selectedAddon.price + '/month' : '';
  document.getElementById('field-total').value = '$' + total.toLocaleString() + '/month';
}

// Phone number auto-formatting (US by default, international when starting with +)
(function() {
  const phoneInput = document.querySelector('#claim-form input[name="phone"]');
  if (!phoneInput) return;

  function formatPhone(value) {
    const hasPlus = value.trim().startsWith('+');
    const digits = value.replace(/\D/g, '');

    if (hasPlus) {
      if (digits.length === 0) return '+';
      const ccLen = digits.length > 11 ? 3 : (digits.length > 10 ? 2 : 1);
      const cc = digits.slice(0, ccLen);
      const rest = digits.slice(ccLen);
      let out = '+' + cc;
      for (let i = 0; i < rest.length; i += 3) {
        out += ' ' + rest.slice(i, i + 3);
      }
      return out;
    }

    const d = digits.slice(0, 10);
    if (d.length === 0) return '';
    if (d.length < 4) return '(' + d;
    if (d.length < 7) return '(' + d.slice(0, 3) + ') ' + d.slice(3);
    return '(' + d.slice(0, 3) + ') ' + d.slice(3, 6) + '-' + d.slice(6, 10);
  }

  phoneInput.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
    const formatted = formatPhone(e.target.value);
    if (formatted !== e.target.value) e.target.value = formatted;
  });
})();

// Website URL auto-prefix https://
(function() {
  const websiteInput = document.querySelector('#claim-form input[name="website"]');
  if (!websiteInput) return;
  const PREFIX = 'https://';
  websiteInput.addEventListener('input', function(e) {
    const v = e.target.value;
    if (v.length === 0) return;
    if (/^https?:\/\//i.test(v)) return;
    e.target.value = PREFIX + v.replace(/^\/+/, '');
  });
  websiteInput.addEventListener('focus', function(e) {
    if (e.target.value === '') e.target.value = PREFIX;
  });
  websiteInput.addEventListener('blur', function(e) {
    if (e.target.value === PREFIX) e.target.value = '';
  });
})();

// Form submission
document.getElementById('claim-form').addEventListener('submit', function(e) {
  e.preventDefault();
  const errEl = document.getElementById('plan-error');
  if (!selectedPlan) {
    errEl.style.display = 'block';
    document.getElementById('order-summary').scrollIntoView({ behavior: 'smooth', block: 'center' });
    return;
  }
  errEl.style.display = 'none';
  const form = this;
  const formData = new FormData(form);
  const params = new URLSearchParams();
  formData.forEach((v, k) => { params.append(k, v); });

  fetch('https://services.leadconnectorhq.com/hooks/NNFCwckEhjBk90UtMRSp/webhook-trigger/gN2YSzrjdjuCyiG7XDsl', {
    method: 'POST',
    headers: { 'Content-Type': 'application/x-www-form-urlencoded' },
    body: params.toString(),
    mode: 'no-cors'
  }).then(() => {
    form.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:3rem 0;"><h3 style="font-family:Cormorant Garamond,serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:1rem;">Thank you!</h3><p style="color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;">We\'ll be in touch within 24 hours with your custom content plan.</p></div>';
  }).catch(() => {
    form.innerHTML = '<div style="text-align:center;padding:3rem 0;"><h3 style="font-family:Cormorant Garamond,serif;font-size:2rem;font-weight:300;margin-bottom:1rem;">Thank you!</h3><p style="color:var(--muted);font-weight:300;">We\'ll be in touch within 24 hours with your custom content plan.</p></div>';
  });
});
</script>

</body>
</html>
